headline: Top S&P500 movers in Tuesday's session
summary: Uncover the latest developments among S&P500 stocks in today's session. Stay tuned to the S&P500 index's top gainers and losers on Tuesday.

headline: Wall Street Lunch: NVIDIA CEO Huang's $1T Marvell Call Triggers $40B Rally, Crushing Puts
summary: Nvidia (NVDA) CEO Jensen Huang said Marvell Technology (MRVL) could become the next semiconductor company to reach a $1T market value, citing growing demand for AI infrastructure.
